metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_68
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Using a PKC alpha specific antibody and knockout control, it is demonstrated that PKC alpha is expressed at the presynaptic terminal of the calyx of held.

10/3/2017 Pim:
-Literal: "In slices from wild-type mice, antibody labeling for PKCα and PKCβ overlapped with vGlut1 labeling, consistent with presynaptic localization of these kinases at the calyx of Held synapse."
-PCKalpha has C2 domain and is able to interact with lipids membranes. In previous annotations of this expert it was established that only a small fraction of the total PKC pool is membrane attached; the rest resides in the cytoplasm. Therefore, the "cytosol" component of the term is inferred. Because domain information is not reflected in GO, I agreed to this term.. Experimental description: In slices from wild-type mice, antibody labeling for PKCα and PKCβ overlapped with vGlut1 labeling, consistent with presynaptic localization of these kinases at the calyx of Held synapse.
